meta.title: CompliTech | Medical & Laboratory Equipment Supply
meta.description: OÜ CompliTech — B2B wholesale supplier of certified medical and laboratory equipment, reagents, and consumables from leading global manufacturers across Europe.

hero.subtitle: Integrated Laboratory Solutions Across Europe
hero.body: OÜ CompliTech is your trusted B2B partner for diagnostic laboratory supply. We deliver certified equipment, reagents, and consumables from the world's leading manufacturers — keeping your laboratory operating without interruption.

about.title: About Us
about.p1: CompliTech OÜ is an international company based in Tallinn, Estonia, specializing in the wholesale supply of certified medical and laboratory equipment to healthcare institutions across Europe.
about.p2: We serve hospitals, clinics, medical centres, and diagnostic laboratories with a comprehensive portfolio of diagnostic instruments, certified reagents, calibrators, quality controls, and consumables from globally recognized manufacturers.
about.p3: Our value proposition is straightforward: through reliable global supply chains and direct manufacturer partnerships, we ensure the uninterrupted operation of your diagnostic laboratory — so you can focus on what matters most: patient care.

brands.title: Our Partners
brands.subtitle: We work with leading global manufacturers to deliver certified, high-quality laboratory solutions.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive supply solutions for diagnostic laboratories across Europe.

items.title: Laboratory Diagnostics Equipment
items.description: Analyzers, hematology systems, immunoassay platforms, coagulation instruments, and point-of-care devices from internationally accredited manufacturers.

items.title: Certified Reagents & Consumables
items.description: CE-certified reagents, calibrators, controls, and laboratory consumables for clinical chemistry, immunology, hematology, and molecular diagnostics.

items.title: Turnkey Integrated Solutions for Labs
items.description: End-to-end laboratory support: equipment sourcing, reagent supply programs, and logistics tailored to your facility's diagnostic workflow.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to equip your laboratory? Contact us for a personalized quote or product inquiry.
